title: LLM inference
description: Text generation via a large language model, behind a hexagonal port. The port is fixed; the provider (and therefore the operational footprint) is a scaffold-time choice.

python.wiring: Provide LLMGatewayAdapter() to your composition root (e.g. dependencies.py get_llm_gateway) typed as the LLMGateway port, and call generate_text() from your service.
